# PERF-91 positive: per-request buffer allocation in Fiber handler (no sync.Pool)
lang: go
file: PERF-091-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"bytes"
	"github.com/gofiber/fiber/v2"
)

func UploadHandler(c *fiber.Ctx) error {
	body := c.Request.Body()
	_ = body
	writer := c.Response.BodyWriter()
	_ = writer
	rdr := bytes.NewReader([]byte("payload"))
	_ = rdr
	return c.SendString("ok")
}
